name: 6pc (Set of 3) Glass Food Storage Container Set Clear - Figmint™: Freezer, Dishwasher & Microwave Safe
description:
Ensure no food is wasted by storing leftovers in this 6-Piece (Set of 3) Glass Food Storage Container Set from Figmint™. Made from durable tempered glass with a transparent design, this set includes three containers in three different sizes plus leakproof, airtight latch lids. The graduated sizes can be nested with the lids on for compact storage, and they're both top rack dishwasher safe and microwave safe without the lids for easy cleaning and reheating.

Figmint™: Mixing up a taste of adventure every day.
